title: Synthetic TNM-staging-logic teaching dataset + exercises
context: TNM staging is a foundational concept in oncology data: learners need to understand how T (tumor), N (node), and M (metastasis) values map to stage groups, and how to write code that applies staging logic. A synthetic dataset of TNM values + computed stage groups (generated from a fixed seed, with TNM distributions calibrated to published aggregate stage distributions) teaches this logic-programming skill without any real patient data. The backlog note specifies 'teaches staging rules; synthetic; not clinical guidance'. The safety notice must be prominent: this is a data-skills exercise, not clinical staging guidance.
objective: Produce a synthetic TNM-staging-logic teaching dataset with TNM components and derived stage groups, exercises on implementing staging logic, and a clear safety notice that this is not clinical guidance.
acceptanceCriteria: Synthetic tabular dataset of patient_id (synthetic), T_value, N_value, M_value, stage_group generated from a fixed seed + provenanced parameters (TNM distributions from published aggregate statistics).

gate-002 PASS artifact committed; safety notice present and prominent: 'This dataset is for learning to code staging rules — not clinical guidance, not real patients, not medical advice'; riskTier:low.
Data dictionary covers all columns; stage_group derivation logic documented; exercises teach learners to implement the TNM->stage mapping in code.
At least 2 exercises: (1) implement a TNM->stage function from a staging table; (2) validate computed stages against the provided stage_group column.
Completeness >= 90/100; Croissant metadata valid; Zenodo DOI minted; reproducibility check = PASS; outputLicense: CC0-1.0.
Technical reviewer and educator reviewer sign-off.
resources: AJCC Cancer Staging Manual (summary/aggregate stage distributions from published literature)
output: A synthetic TNM-staging-logic teaching dataset (CSV/TSV) + provenance.json + gate PASS artifact + data dictionary + exercises/solutions + Croissant metadata + Zenodo DOI.
